GoalId.description: The unique ID of the goal

GameId.description: The unique ID of the game tied to this goal

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team associated with this goal

PlayerId.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID stays with the player their entire career.

Name.description: The full name of the player who scored the goal

AssistedByPlayerId1.description: The unique ID of the first assisted player

AssistedByPlayerName1.description: The player's name of the first assisted player

AssistedByPlayerId2.description: The unique ID of the second assisted player

AssistedByPlayerName2.description: The player's name of the second assisted player

GameMinute.description: The minute in the game in which the goal was scored

GameMinuteExtra.description: The extra minute in the game in which the goal was scored
